ZLOG_COMPRAS/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
ZLOG_COMPRAS/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against JDK 17, failing to leverage JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

ZLOG_COMPRAS/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag for the target Java version.
ZLOG_COMPRAS/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not strictly enforce API compatibility with the target JDK version specified in properties.

ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better concurrency performance and modern API usage.
